title: SBMD v4.0 Registration Schema
description: JSON Schema for the SbmdDriver() registration object in .sbmd.js spec files (schema version 4.0). Functions are represented as `true` after extraction.

constants.description: Named constants. Values must be primitives (number, string, boolean).

aliases.description: Named references to Matter cluster attributes, events, or commands.

barton.description: Barton device-model metadata (device class and version) for this driver.

matter.description: Matter matching criteria that determine which devices this driver handles.

reporting.description: Default Matter attribute reporting intervals for this driver's subscriptions.

resources.description: Device-level resource declarations keyed by resource name.

endpoints.description: Endpoint definitions keyed by endpoint ID string.

attributeHandlers.description: Attribute report handlers keyed by handler name.

eventHandlers.description: Event handlers keyed by handler name.

commandHandlers.description: Unsolicited command handlers keyed by handler name.

functionRef.description: A function reference. Represented as `true` in extracted JSON.

attributeId.description: Attribute ID. Mutually exclusive with eventId and commandId.

eventId.description: Event ID. Mutually exclusive with attributeId and commandId.

commandId.description: Command ID. Mutually exclusive with attributeId and eventId.

type.description: Matter data type (documentation only, ignored by runtime).

barton.description: Barton device-model metadata describing how this driver's devices are classified within Barton.

deviceClassVersion.description: Version of the device class schema.

matter.description: Matter matching criteria and options that determine which devices this driver binds to.

deviceTypes.description: Matter device type IDs this driver handles.

revision.description: Minimum Matter device type revision required.

vendorId.description: Matter vendor ID for vendor-specific matching.

productId.description: Matter product ID for vendor-specific matching. Requires vendorId.

featureClusters.description: Cluster IDs whose feature maps should be cached.

defaultTimeoutMs.description: Default timeout in milliseconds for deferred operations.

reporting.description: Default Matter attribute reporting configuration (minimum and maximum intervals) for this driver's subscriptions.

minSecs.description: Minimum attribute reporting interval in seconds.

maxSecs.description: Maximum attribute reporting interval in seconds.

attributes.description: Alias names identifying Matter attributes to pre-fetch from device data cache.

resources.description: Barton resource paths to pre-fetch. Format: 'endpointId/resourceName' or 'resourceName'.

resourceHandler.description: A resource handler: either an object with handler + optional supplements, or a direct function reference.

type.description: Resource value type: 'boolean', 'string', 'function', or a custom type.

modes.description: Access modes controlling resource behavior. 'volatile' disables value caching (CACHING_POLICY_NEVER) so updateResource emits an event on every call, even when the value is unchanged.

prerequisites.description: Alias names or cluster IDs that must be satisfied before the resource is created.

optional.description: If true, silently skip when prerequisites are not met instead of failing commissioning.

resources.description: Resource declarations keyed by resource name.

aliases.description: Alias names to match. Mutually exclusive with clusterId.

clusterId.description: Cluster to match. Mutually exclusive with aliases.

attributeId.description: Single attribute ID or '*' wildcard. Mutually exclusive with attributeIds.

attributeIds.description: Multiple attribute IDs. Mutually exclusive with attributeId.

aliases.description: Alias names to match. Mutually exclusive with clusterId.

clusterId.description: Cluster to match. Mutually exclusive with aliases.

eventId.description: Single event ID or '*' wildcard. Mutually exclusive with eventIds.

eventIds.description: Multiple event IDs. Mutually exclusive with eventId.

aliases.description: Alias names to match. Mutually exclusive with clusterId.

clusterId.description: Cluster to match. Mutually exclusive with aliases.

commandId.description: Single command ID or '*' wildcard. Mutually exclusive with commandIds.

commandIds.description: Multiple command IDs. Mutually exclusive with commandId.
